title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is finally here. Hoping
to make it a perfect finale, Fine Motion swears to
put on a performance that will remain in the
hearts of everyone who watches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Do you have the determination to face the
Empress on this honorable stage?" Air Groove
asks. Fine Motion smiles back at her. "Of course."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An esteemed and momentous stage is set for the
rematch they've longed for. The battle begins
now!
